title: Rulemaking notice for 3 CCR 702-4
summary: The Colorado Legislature passed of House Bill 19-1174, The Colorado Legislature passed of House Bill 19-1174, Concerning out-of-network health care services provided to covered persons, during the 2019 legislative session, and which was recently signed into law. The signing of this bill into law makes promulgating the revisions to draft amended regulation 4-2-53 and the promulgation of draft new regulation 4-2-61 no longer necessary.
source_evidence: Department of Regulatory Agencies Division of Insurance 3 CCR 702-4 Series 4-2 2018-00595 05/22/2019 The Colorado Legislature passed of House Bill 19-1174, The Colorado Legislature passed of House Bill 19-1174, Concerning out-of-network health care services provided to covered persons, during the 2019 legislative session, and which was recently signed into law. The signing of this bill into law makes promulgating the revisions to draft amended regulation 4-2-53 and the promulgation of draft new regulation 4-2-61 no longer necessary.

title: Rulemaking notice for 3 CCR 702-5
summary: The recent adoption by the legislature of Senate Bill 19-090, Concerning the operation of peer-to-peer motor vehicle sharing businesses, will require additional revisions to be made to this regulation. As the requirements in this legislation will become effective on January 1, 2020, the Division has determined that terminating the current rulemaking process for this regulation is necessary in order that additional revisions can be made.
source_evidence: Department of Regulatory Agencies Division of Insurance 3 CCR 702-5 2019-00110 05/02/2019 The recent adoption by the legislature of Senate Bill 19-090, Concerning the operation of peer-to-peer motor vehicle sharing businesses, will require additional revisions to be made to this regulation. As the requirements in this legislation will become effective on January 1, 2020, the Division has determined that terminating the current rulemaking process for this regulation is necessary in order that additional revisions can be made.
